sidebar.deleteConfirmMessage: This action is irreversible. The conversation "{{title}}" will be permanently deleted.

chat.title: Chat
chat.placeholder: Chat will be available after configuration
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question about your documents...
chat.inputPlaceholderIngestion: Ingestion in progress... You can already ask questions.
chat.description: Configure your knowledge base to start asking questions.
chat.semanticDescription: Ask a question to run semantic retrieval and display the most relevant chunks.
chat.lexicalDescription: Ask a question to run lexical BM25 retrieval on exact terms.
chat.searchPlaceholder: Example: What is the backup policy?
chat.emptyResults: Type a query to display results.
chat.testQuestionIntro: Your RAG is ready! Here is a test question to check everything works:
chat.defaultTestQuestion: What are the main topics covered in the documents?
chat.noThanks: No thanks, I'll ask my own
chat.emptyTitle: Ask me a question about your documents.
chat.emptySubtitle: Your local search assistant is ready.
chat.notConfiguredSubtitle: Configure your knowledge base to start asking questions.
chat.aiDisclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Always verify the provided sources.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configuration settings will appear here after setting up your knowledge base.
settings.chunkingDescription: Tune splitting strategy and preview results.
settings.embeddingDescription: Configure embedding provider, API keys, and cache.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitoring and statistics will appear here once ingestion is launched.

queryLog.title: Query logs
queryLog.purgeConfirm: Delete logs according to configured retention?

security.keyringInfo: Keys are stored in the native system keyring.
security.encryptLogsDesc: Enables AES-256 encryption of sensitive data in logs.
security.purged: All local data has been deleted
security.privacy3: External APIs are only called for chosen features

expertise.title: Expertise Level
expertise.intermediateDesc: Common settings plus some advanced options

config.noApiKeys: API keys are not included in the import.

general.autoDesc: In automatic mode, changes trigger an incremental ingestion after this delay.
general.manualDesc: In manual mode, ingestion is launched from the dashboard.

container.title: LOKO
container.subtitle: | Configuration
container.autoSave: All your modifications are saved automatically.

welcome.title: LOKO
welcome.subtitle: Your intelligent document assistant
welcome.description: LOKO transforms your documents into an AI-searchable knowledge base.
welcome.stepsTitle: In a few steps, we will:

system.title: System Check
system.subtitle: We are analyzing your environment to configure LOKO optimally.
system.ollamaDesc: Allows running AI models securely on your own machine.
system.gpuDesc: Significantly improves ingestion and generation speed.

searchType.title: Search Strategy
searchType.subtitle: How do you want LOKO to retrieve information to generate answers?
searchType.hybridDesc: Combines the strength of semantic search (conceptual) and lexical search (exact keywords).
searchType.semanticDesc: Finds documents by their meaning and concepts, even if exact keywords don't match.
searchType.lexicalDesc: Ideal for finding precise technical terms, product references, or proper nouns via keywords.

expertise.title: Your Expertise Level
expertise.subtitle: LOKO adapts to your needs. Do you want a simple setup or full control over all settings?
expertise.simpleDesc: Hides complex technical configurations (chunking, vectors). Ideal for starting quickly with recommended settings.
expertise.intermediateDesc: Access to primary options (models) with advanced settings hidden.
expertise.expertDesc: Full access to parsing algorithms, chunk dimensions, hybrid search scaling, and re-ranking.

metadata.title: Metadata Configuration
metadata.subtitle: Metadata structures your RAG base. Select a document to edit its attributes, or select multiple for bulk editing.
metadata.noFiles: No files found matching the criteria.
metadata.author: Author

ingestion.title: Ingestion & Preprocessing
ingestion.subtitle: These settings define how your documents are read and cleaned. Default values are recommended.
ingestion.autoRecommended: Automatically monitors your folder and indexes new documents. Recommended
ingestion.manualDesc: You trigger ingestion from the dashboard whenever you want.
ingestion.autoDesc: LOKO monitors your folder and indexes changes automatically.
ingestion.cleanWhitespaceDesc: Removes unnecessary spaces and carriage returns
ingestion.removeUrlsDesc: Useful if links disrupt search accuracy

profile.title: What kind of content best describes your base?
profile.t1: Enables OCR and advanced table extraction.
profile.t2: Increases context window and number of retrieved documents.
profile.q3: Documents longer than 50 pages on average?
profile.t3: Adapts the chunking strategy for long documents.
profile.t4: Enables reranking and reduces model temperature.
profile.t6: Forces inclusion of page numbers and titles in citations.

chunking.title: Semantic Chunking
chunking.subtitle: Long documents are divided into smaller pieces ("chunks") to be processed efficiently.
chunking.overlapDesc: Overlap prevents cutting a sentence or idea in the middle.
chunking.chunkIndexDesc: Adds a unique identifier (useful for LLMs)

embedding.title: Embedding Model
embedding.subtitle: Embeddings convert your texts into mathematical vectors to enable semantic search.
embedding.localRecommendDesc: Multilingual E5. Around 2.2GB will be downloaded on first test. CPU/GPU optimized.
embedding.openaiApiDesc: Fast, high performance and precise. Requires a paid OpenAI API key.
embedding.ollamaLocalDesc: 100% private, free. Ideal if you already downloaded nomic-embed-text.
embedding.openaiKeyDesc: The key will be stored securely in your OS keychain.
embedding.noOllamaModels: No Ollama models detected. Please install Ollama and download an embedding model (e.g. nomic-embed-text).
embedding.localModelDesc: This model will be downloaded and executed locally independently of Ollama. Click "Test connection" to force download if not already done. This operation might take a few minutes.

vectorStore.title: Vector Database
vectorStore.subtitle: This is where your chunked and vectorized documents will be stored for ultra-fast search.
vectorStore.localQdrantDesc: LOKO natively integrates Qdrant. Your data remains on this computer, with no complex setup required.
vectorStore.collectionDesc: Alphanumeric characters, dashes and underscores only.

semantic.title: Semantic Search Settings
semantic.subtitle: Adjust how the system retrieves documents based on the meaning of your question.
semantic.thresholdDesc: A higher threshold reduces false positives but might ignore relevant documents.

lexical.title: Lexical Search Settings
lexical.subtitle: Adjust how the system finds documents containing the exact words of your query (BM25).
lexical.topKDesc: Defines how many text blocks the system should retrieve when searching for exact keyword matches.

hybrid.title: Hybrid Search Settings
hybrid.subtitle: Adjust how the system combines semantic and lexical results.

reranking.title: Re-ranking (Optional)
reranking.subtitle: Re-ranking re-sorts search results with a more precise AI model to ensure the most relevant documents are at the top.
reranking.enableDesc: Significantly improves precision, but slightly reduces speed. Highly recommended for most professional usages.
reranking.cohereKeyDesc: Required for cloud re-ranking with Cohere.
reranking.topN: Final number of documents sent to LLM (Top N)
reranking.topNDesc: The higher this number, the more context the LLM will have, but inference will be slower and more expensive (if via API).

llm.title: Answer Generator (LLM)
llm.subtitle: This is the "brain" that will read the found documents and write the final answer for you.
llm.ollamaLocalDesc: 100% private and free. Ideal with Llama 3, Qwen 3, Mistral.
llm.apiProviderDesc: Very smart and fast. Requires a paid API key.
llm.apiKeyDesc: The key will be stored securely in your OS keychain.
llm.noOllamaModels: No Ollama LLM models detected. Please download a model (e.g., ollama pull llama3.2).
llm.noApiModels: No models available for this provider.

agents.title: Intelligent Agents
agents.subtitle: LOKO can use a multi-agent architecture to break down complex questions and search in multiple directions simultaneously.
agents.enableDesc: Allows the LLM to think, formulate its own searches, and auto-correct its answers iteratively.
agents.perfNote: Using agents multiplies the number of queries sent to the LLM. If using the OpenAI API, this will increase your costs. If using Ollama, each answer will take significantly more time.
